directions: Alejandro B. Catambay Hall. Along Pili Drive, this building is to the right of EE Auditorium facing the field.
Alejandro B. Catambay Hall. Along Pili Drive, this building is to the right of EE Auditorium facing the field.
Along Pili Drive, past ICRops. Has a curved driveway in front of the building.
In front of CAS Annex 1, to the left of SEARCA. Has multiple wings housing the Institute of Biological Sciences and the Institute of Weed Science, Entomology, and Plant Pathology (IWEP)
College of Agriculture and Food Science cluster. In the upper campus area near the agriculture facilities.
The main CAS building is BEHIND the Oblation statue. CAS Bxx rooms are in the basement (stairs in front of OCS kiosks). CAS 1xx rooms are on the first floor. CAS LITE rooms are on the 2nd floor.
The tall 4-floor building to the LEFT of Oble, beside OUR (Office of the University Registrar). Has galleries (GAL) on lower floors and lecture rooms on floors 3-4.
The 2-storey building beside CAS Annex 1, to the left of Oble.
College of Development Communication building. Located at Carabao Park, in front of the Administration Building.
Part of the CEAT complex. A small building in front of the Agricultural Sciences Institute.
College of Engineering and Agro-Industrial Technology complex. The small building-complex where the Kanan jeeps turns left from Pili Drive.
College of Economics and Management. The first cluster of buildings if you follow the Kanan road from the main gate. A large building complex with many lecture rooms (CEM 101-118, 201-205).
Housing the Lansigan Hall, look for a big parking space in front of this massive building in between FPPS and Forest Science
College of Human Ecology (Gil F. Saguiguit Hall). Located beside Physical Sciences, on the left side of OPark when facing the Oblation.
A small building complex in front of PHTRC and beside the main CEAT complex housing ENSC classes.
Beside Copeland Gym, this building houses the CVM-IAS Library and has a curved driveway in front of it.
Department of Agricultural and Applied Economics. Part of the main CEM buiilding
White, three-storey building beside ICrops in Pili Drive. Part of CEAT complex. Houses EE lecture rooms and the EE Auditorium.
The building to the left when facing the CFNR admin building. It has a big label of "FOREST SCIENCE"
Behind the International House dormitory, at the foot of the ascent going to UHS and Forestry.
The HL Building is behind the Civil Engineering Building.
Institute of Agricultural and Biosystems Engineering. In the CEAT area.
Institute of Cooperatives and Bio-Enterprise Development. Part of the CEM area.
Institute of Crop Science building. In the CAFS cluster.
Part of CEAT. Contains IE lecture rooms and labs.
Institute of Food Science and Technology. In the CAFS cluster, has main building and several annexes (A, B, C, D) including pilot plant facilities.
Institute of Human Nutrition and Food. Part of the CHE building complex.
Institute of Renewable Natural Resources. Part of the CFNR complex in the upper campus.
Institute of Weed Science, Entomology and Plant Pathology. Technically under one roof with BioSci.
Also called the Landscape Horticulture Knowledge Center Building, this can be found in front of the University Police Force (UPF) headquarters
The newer Math Building behind the Old Math Building is white and has three stories.

The main gym facility. From the main gate, it's on the right side before reaching the academic buildings. Has 3 floors - Wing B is towards the parking at the back. Contains various sports facilities including courts and training areas.
The swimming pool area, located behind Baker Hall, which is at Freedom Park. Managed by the Department of Human Kinetics (CAS).
Post-Harvest Training and Research Center. In the CAFS area.
Francisco O. Santos Hall. A wide building to the RIGHT of Oble. Has PSLH (Physical Science Lecture Halls) A and B, plus many PS rooms (B-100 to B-205, C-101 to C-320).
The Plant Tissue Culture Facility is located behind the Agricultural Systems Institute (ASI) building in front of the CEAT complex
Temporary Common Classroom at the Old Maquiling School. Located beside the CHE building, behind the Administration Building. Has multiple rooms (TCC 1, 2, 4, 5, 11, 22).
The main library building. Located behind the Pegaraw statue (winged tamaraw).
UP Rural High School. Located in Bay, Laguna, OUTSIDE the main UPLB campus.
Having a big label of "FORESTRY INFORMATION" at the front, this building is beside the Institute of Renewable Natural Resources building
Having a big label of "WOOD SCIENCE" at the front, this building is to the right facing the CAFS admin building.
The Franciso M. Fronda Hall under CAFS-IAS houses some labs and lecture halls of CAFS. Go past the
Beside the Veterinary Paraclinical Sciences Building, this building is in front of the CVM admin building in the CVM cluster
Beside the Basic Veterinary Sciences Building, this building is in front of the CVM-IAS building in the CVM cluster.
Housing the Animal and Dairy Sciences Cluster, this building is a bit behind Vraja Cuisine and beside the CVM admin building.
Past the Animal Husbandry Arch, the Meat Science Building is beside the Animal Husbandry Building.
Housing the various Animal Science Lecture Halls (ASLH), this building is beside Fronda Hall past the Animal Husbandry Arch

buildingName: Department of Military Sciences and Tactics
directions: The short building complex beside Baker Hall, this building houses some ROTC classes and is the headquarters of the UPLB ROTC unit
The big grassy field in the center of the campus, this is where some ROTC classes take place. This is in front of DL Umali Hall and the SU Building.

buildingName: Agricultural Machinery Testing and Evaluation Center
directions: Officially the Roberto C. Bautista Hall, this building can be found on the left side while traversing Pili Drive going to IRRI. It's beside the Tau Alpha Sports Complex.
The old-looking building on the left before the bridge to CEAT, just across the Diocesan Shrine of St. Therese.
Part of the UP Open University Campus
